name: Session monitoring
description: View live status of a running agent session from mobile

name: Launch and resume sessions
description: Start a new agent run or resume/continue an existing one from mobile

name: Governed approvals
description: Approve/deny/edit agent tool-call requests from mobile with risk context

name: Questions and plan review
description: Answer agent clarifying questions or review a plan before execution

name: Live interactive terminal
description: Full PTY/shell access from mobile, not just structured events

name: File browsing
description: Browse the remote filesystem from mobile

name: Git status/operations
description: View git status, branches, commits from mobile

name: Diff review
description: Review code diffs produced by the agent, ideally with inline comments

name: Test results
description: View test run output/results from mobile

name: Live web preview
description: Preview a running dev server's UI from mobile

name: Push notifications
description: OS-level push notifications for agent events

name: Actionable push (approve from lock screen)
description: Approve/deny directly from a push notification/lock screen without opening the app

name: Live Activities / Dynamic Island
description: iOS Live Activity showing real-time run status

name: Home screen widgets
description: iOS/Android widgets showing agent/queue status

name: Watch app support
description: Apple Watch companion for status/approve/deny

name: Multi-provider / cross-vendor support
description: Supports more than one agent vendor (e.g. Claude Code AND Codex AND others) in one app

name: Multi-machine fleet view
description: One view across multiple hosts/machines the user owns

name: Policy engine
description: Configurable rules for what's auto-allowed vs needs approval vs blocked

name: Policy presets/templates
description: Pre-built policy templates (e.g. conservative/balanced/permissive)

name: Audit log
description: Record of what actions were taken/approved/denied

name: Tamper-evident audit (hash-chained or equivalent)
description: Audit log that can cryptographically prove it hasn't been altered

name: User/device identity
description: Account system, device pairing/identity

name: Role-based access control
description: Different permission levels for different team members

name: True end-to-end encryption
description: Transport where the intermediary/server cannot read the content, not just TLS-in-transit

name: Self-hosting
description: Can run the control plane / relay entirely on infrastructure the user controls

name: Managed relay
description: Vendor-hosted relay/push infrastructure so the user doesn't need to self-host

name: Usage and cost/budget visibility
description: Token/cost usage tracking and budget limits

name: Team features
description: Multi-user org/team support, shared visibility

name: Third-party integrations
description: Slack, Discord, Telegram, GitHub Actions, etc.

name: Emergency stop / kill switch
description: Immediately halt a running agent (or all agents) from mobile

name: Setup/config drift detection
description: Detect when a host's environment/config has drifted from expected baseline

name: Device revocation
description: Revoke a paired device's access remotely

name: Biometric/passcode gate on sensitive actions
description: Require Face ID/Touch ID/passcode before approving or viewing sensitive content

name: Command risk classification
description: Automatically classify proposed actions by risk level (low/medium/high/critical)

name: Native mobile app (not PWA/web)
description: True native iOS/Android app vs. an installable web app

name: Attach to existing session
description: Discover and attach to an agent session already running, not just ones launched via this tool

name: Voice control
description: Two-way voice interaction with the agent
